templates.name: 5/3/1 Wendler
templates.description: Jim Wendler's classic strength program built on 4 main lifts progressing over a 4-week cycle. Ideal for intermediate lifters aiming to build a long-term strength base.

templates.name: Push Pull Legs (PPL)
templates.description: 6-day push/pull/legs split targeting each muscle group twice a week. High volume, proven for muscle growth at intermediate level.

templates.name: Upper/Lower
templates.description: 4-day upper/lower split alternating strength and hypertrophy sessions. Balanced frequency and volume — great for beginners and intermediates.

templates.name: Booty/Upper/Lower
templates.description: 3-day split with dedicated glute/posterior chain day plus upper and lower sessions. Designed for athletes prioritising lower body development.

templates.name: StrongLifts 5x5
templates.description: Simple 3-day full-body program alternating two workouts. Add weight every session. Perfect for beginners building their first strength base.
